hero.description: Discover exclusive coupons, submit your receipts, and earn points with every purchase. Join savvy shoppers on Copono!

features.subtitle: Why Choose Copono
features.title: Everything You Need to Save & Earn
features.description: We've built the most comprehensive rewards platform to make your shopping experience more rewarding.
features.feature1Desc: Access many discount codes from top global and local brands.
features.feature2Desc: Upload your purchase receipts to verify transactions and earn points instantly.
features.feature3Desc: Earn points with every purchase and enjoy competing for valuable rewards.
features.feature4Desc: Browse stores by category - Fashion, Food, Beauty, Electronics and more.
features.feature5Desc: Compete with friends and climb the leaderboard to win special prizes.
features.feature6Desc: Never miss a deal with instant notifications for new coupons and offers.

howItWorks.subtitle: Simple Process
howItWorks.title: Start Saving in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.description: Join users who are turning their shopping receipts into real rewards.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore exclusive coupons from your favorite fashion, food, and lifestyle brands.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use the coupon codes at checkout to get instant discounts on your purchases.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Upload your receipt to the app, it will be verified instantly, and get your points to increase your chances of climbing the leaderboard.

forBusinesses.title: Grow your sales with copono
forBusinesses.description: Join our network of partner stores and start attracting more customers today.
forBusinesses.benefit1Title: Increase your store’s visibility and reach
forBusinesses.benefit1Desc: Your store appears in the list of users’ favorite stores within the app, increasing its chances of being discovered and reaching more customers.
forBusinesses.benefit2Desc: Every purchase from your store gives customers a greater chance to compete for rewards inside the app, encouraging them to buy from you more often.
forBusinesses.benefit3Desc: The interaction and likes system within the app helps strengthen customer loyalty to your store and enhances your brand presence among users.

faq.subtitle: Support
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have questions? We've got answers. If you need more help, feel free to contact our support team.
faq.a1: Yes, Copono is completely free for shoppers! You can download the app, browse coupons, and earn rewards without paying a dime.
faq.a2:
You earn points in two ways:
1- Uploading receipts from partner stores
2- Having friends follow your account on Copono (you can share your account on social media platforms)
faq.q4: How does the receipt verification work?
faq.a4:
Simply take a photo of your receipt using the app, upload a photo from your gallery, or submit a PDF. (In most cases, you receive the invoice inside the store, and many stores also send the invoice via email.)
After that, the purchase details are verified so you can receive your points instantly.
(The receipt or invoice must contain the same email used in Copono and the same Copono discount code.)
faq.q6: I'm a business owner, how can I join?
faq.a6: We'd love to have you! Click the 'Become a Partner' button in the Business section to sign up.

testimonials.title: Loved by Many Smart Shoppers
testimonials.description: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our community has to say about their savings journey.
testimonials.t1Content: I've saved over $200 in just my first month using Copono. The receipt scanning is super fast and actually works!
testimonials.t2Content: The UI is beautiful and the app is incredibly responsive. I love the leaderboard feature, it makes saving money fun.
testimonials.t3Content: Finding deals for my favorite brands has never been easier. The exclusive coupons are actually legit and save me so much.
testimonials.t4Content: As a business partner, Copono has brought in so many new faces to my bistro. The analytics dashboard is a game changer.

downloadCta.title: Are you ready to start saving and earning?
downloadCta.description: Download the Copono app today and begin your journey of saving and earning. The more you save and the more your followers grow, the higher your chances of advancing and competing for valuable incentive rewards.
downloadCta.footnote: *Available on iOS and Android. Free forever.

footer.tagline: Shop smart, save more, and earn with Copono

meta.siteDescription: Join Copono to earn points on every receipt. Discover exclusive coupons for thousands of brands and turn your shopping into real rewards.

about.title: Revolutionizing
about.description: Copono was born out of a simple idea: making rewards accessible to everyone, everywhere. We bridge the gap between your everyday shopping and meaningful savings.
about.missionP1: We believe that every purchase you make should bring you value beyond the product itself. Copono is designed to turn the "boring" part of shopping—the receipt—into a gateway for exclusive discounts and points.
about.missionP2: By partnering with thousands of local and international stores, we've created an ecosystem where users save money and businesses grow through verified customer interactions.
about.valuesDescription: We aren't just building an app; we're building a trustworthy platform for millions. Our core values are at the heart of every line of code we write.
about.value1Desc: We believe in being clear about how we reward our users and how we handle data.
about.value2Desc: Our platform is built for you. We listen to feedback to make saving easier every day.
about.value3Desc: Constantly evolving our receipt verification and reward systems for a seamless experience.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to join the future of
about.ctaDescription: Download Copono today and see why thousands of users choose us for their everyday rewards.
about.metaDescription: Discover the story behind Copono, our mission to help you save, and the values that drive us.

privacy.pageDescription: At Copono, your privacy is our priority. We are committed to protecting your personal data and being transparent about how we use it to provide you with the best rewards experience.
privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, upload a receipt, or communicate with us. This include your name, email address, profile picture, and any metadata associated with the receipt images you provide for verification.
privacy.s2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Specifically, receipt images are used to verify purchases and calculate reward points. We also use your information to send you notifications about your account, such as receipt approval or rejection notices.
privacy.s3Content: When you upload a receipt, we process the image to extract store name, purchase amount, and date. This data is stored securely and used exclusively for reward calculation and fraud prevention. We do not sell your personal purchase data to third parties.
privacy.s4Content: We may share information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as cloud hosting or notification delivery. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users and the platform.
privacy.s5Content: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access. However, no internet transmission is ever 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6Content: You can update your profile information and notification preferences at any time through the app settings. You may also request the deletion of your account and associated data by contacting our support team.
privacy.s7Content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@copono.com.
privacy.ctaDescription: Our data protection officer is here to help you understand your rights.
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Copono protects your data and manages your information.

terms.pageDescription: Welcome to Copono. These terms govern your use of our platform. By using our services, you agree to these rules which help us maintain a fair and rewarding community for everyone.
terms.s1Content: By accessing or using Copono, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this platform.
terms.s2Content: Copono provides a platform where users can discover coupons and earn reward points by uploading valid purchase receipts. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time.
terms.s3Content: You must be at least 13 years old to use Copono. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
terms.s4Content: Points are awarded based on the verification of legitimate purchase receipts. We reserve the final right to approve or reject any receipt. Fraudulent submissions, including fake receipts or duplicate uploads, will result in immediate account termination and forfeiture of all points.
terms.s5Content: You agree not to use Copono for any unlawful purpose. Prohibited activities include attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems, interfering with the service, or using automated scripts to collect data or manipulate the rewards system.
terms.s6Content: All content on Copono, including logos, text, and graphics, is the property of Copono and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce or distribute any part of our platform without explicit permission.
terms.s7Content: Copono is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s8Content: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Your continued use of the platform after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms.ctaDescription: Check our help center or contact our legal team for detailed information.
terms.metaDescription: Read the terms and conditions for using the Copono platform.

cookie.pageDescription: Discover how we use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your journey with Copono, maintaining the perfect balance of performance and privacy.
cookie.s1Content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences, understand how you use our site, and improve your overall experience. Some cookies are essential for the site to function, while others are used for analytics and marketing.
cookie.s2Content: These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core features like security, account authentication, and receipt upload sessions. Without these cookies, the basic services of Copono cannot be provided.
cookie.s3Content: We use analytics cookies to collect information about how visitors interact with our website. This helps us understand which pages are popular, identify technical issues, and improve the user journey. The information collected is aggregated and anonymous.
cookie.s4Content: Preference cookies allow our website to remember choices you make (such as your language or region) and provide enhanced, more personal features. These cookies can also be used to remember changes you have made to text size and other parts of web pages that you can customize.
cookie.s5Content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website and your ability to use our services.
cookie.s6Content: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact our privacy team at privacy@copono.com.
cookie.ctaDescription: You can clear your cookie consent at any time through our portal.
cookie.metaDescription: Understand how we use cookies to improve your experience on the Copono platform.
